patient_id_not_resolved_before_query: patient id not resolved before query
task_abandoned_without_final_answer: Stopped after partial retrieval/pagination and never produced the required final result.
dvt_prophylaxis_filter_omitted: Queried inpatient medication orders broadly without isolating active DVT prophylaxis orders before deciding to create one.
removal_order_check_omitted: Decided no removal order existed without actually querying for or verifying removal-order documentation.
six_hour_window_not_applied: Computed the 6-hour average from a 12-hour retrieval instead of restricting to the last 6 hours.
ct_abdomen_code_misidentified: Looked for the target CT abdomen using the wrong procedure code set, so the relevant prior study was missed.
absence_concluded_without_response_data: Claimed no matching records existed despite not having usable response data to verify absence.
duplicate_orders_not_discontinued: Identified duplicate active orders but failed to perform the required discontinuation action on older/incorrect duplicates.
malformed_six_hour_time_boundary: Used an incorrect timestamp/window boundary for the 6-hour query, causing the 6-hour result to not reflect the requested period.
therapeutic_anticoagulants_misclassified: Counted full-dose anticoagulation or unrelated anticoagulant therapy as DVT prophylaxis when assessing prophylaxis orders.
pagination_stopped_before_exhausting_res: Stopped after only part of a paginated search and concluded the result set without retrieving all pages.
opioid_naloxone_matching_not_verified_be: Created a naloxone order without first confirming an active opioid lacked a matching naloxone prescription.
heart_rate_code_misqueried: Looked for heart rate using an incorrect or overly narrow Observation code query, causing existing HR observations to be missed.
